description:
Modal is usually wider than the side panel. 
Side panel in mobile ui would need to fill entire width. 
UI is not trivial here. 
Is there any reason why we'd need separate/different content for side panel and edit aim / edit phase / edit connection?

status.comment: Analyzed and documented the presentation, persistence, reuse, and mobile boundaries.

reflection: Documented the decision in meta/ui-side-panel-modal-analysis.md. Keep side panel and modals as distinct surfaces: persistent immediate-save inspector versus staged transactional editor. Share typed store mutations and small controls, not a universal form. Recommended mobile panel as responsive full-width drawer/overlay. Verified against GraphSidePanel.vue, AimEditModal.vue, ConnectionDetailsModal.vue, their callers, and tests.
